_comment: Validation config for gemma-4-26B-A4B-it on Neuron. NOT RUN YET (dry-run port). Update model_path / compiled_model_path before invoking scripts/validate_model.py on hardware.

test_parameters._description: First-pass smoke test: short prompt, modest seq_len. Use the same batch_size and seq_len you compiled with.

notes: MoE compilation requires --verify-hlo=false. NxDI >= 2.27 required for sliding-window short-prompt fix.
